name: mathtalking-csv-editor-desktop
description: Tauri desktop wrapper for the offline MathTalking CSV editor.

scripts.dev: npm run sync && cargo tauri dev
scripts.build: npm run sync && cargo tauri build
scripts.build:mas: npm run sync && cargo tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.mas.conf.json --bundles app --target universal-apple-darwin
scripts.check: npm run sync && cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
